svg.title: ROC and Precision-Recall curves for a mock fraud classifier
svg.desc: Two plots generated from deterministic mock classification scores. The ROC curve plots true positive rate against false positive rate. The Precision-Recall curve plots precision against recall.
svg.text: Threshold curves from mock fraud scores
Positive class: fraud | 80 fraud and 920 legitimate transactions | each curve point uses a different score threshold
Higher curves and larger areas are better. ROC favors the upper-left; PR favors staying high as recall moves right.
